intent: asking about the product refund policy

queries.generated_response: We offer full refunds within 30 days of purchase. Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days back to your original payment method.

queries.query: How do I get my money back if I am not happy with the product?
queries.generated_response: If you are not satisfied, you can request a refund within 30 days. Once approved, it takes 5-7 business days to appear on your statement.

queries.query: Can I return a product for a full refund?
queries.generated_response: Yes, full refunds are available within the 30-day return window. Processing typically takes 5-7 business days.

intent: asking how to reset a password

queries.query: How do I reset my password?
queries.generated_response: To reset your password, click 'Forgot Password' on the login page. You will receive an email with a reset link within 2 minutes. The link expires after 15 minutes.

queries.query: I forgot my password, what should I do?
queries.generated_response: No problem! Just hit the 'Forgot Password' button when logging in and we will send a reset link to your email.
